name:
metal lifeboat hangar open to
outer space
description:
I'm in a metal lifeboat hangar open to
outer space
hints: The lifeboat hangar is open to space! Going outside would be instantly fatal. You need a lifeboat.
There may be a lifeboat here but you need to prepare it or find the controls to launch it. DO NOT go into outer space directly.
GO LIFEBOAT to try to enter a lifeboat for escape. GO OUTER SPACE means instant death by freezing. GO FIELD returns through the flickering force field to the tunnel.
If the lifeboat is not accessible, you may need to complete other puzzles first - check the engine room and control rooms for clues.

effects: Message: I quickly freeze to death!

needs: which is weakly flickering (must be in room)

notes: Lifeboat hangar open to outer space - the potential escape route from the ship. Going into outer space causes death by freezing. The lifeboat cannot be entered initially (sorry, I can't). Going through the force field returns to room 9. The player must solve other puzzles to make the lifeboat accessible. This is near the endgame area.
